texto: Unlike national legal systems, there are precious few avenues to address judicial activism at the WTO. You pretty much have to gain consensus to change the agreements, or simply withdraw from the system. The first is nearly impossible, and the second would be - in the view of many - cataclysmic.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Robert Lighthizer sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Unlike national legal systems, there are precious few avenues to address judicial activism at the…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, change, impossible, útil em momentos de mudanca e impossible.
